info.viSezaH: DAtupAWe vidyamAnam idam gaRasUtram asti  sarveByaH   tftIyAsamarTeByaH prAtipadikeByaH 'atikrAmati' (ullaNGanaM karoti / agre gacCati ityarTaH) asmin arTe Ric-pratyayaH Bavati - iti asya gaRasUtrasya ASayaH  yaTA 'aSvena atikrAmati' asmin arTe aSva-prAtipadikAt Ric-pratyayaM kftvA 'aSvi' iti RijantaH DAtuH sidDyati  'rAjA aSvayati' etAdfSAH prayogAH  rAjA aSvasya sAhAyyena anyAn atikrAmati ityASayaH
